frozen_pre_dev_condition.condition: main null-path train/internal D2p pair concordance must be at least 0.80 before dev

reason: The sole dev evaluator call occurred after the frozen pre-dev anchor condition had failed. Mechanical score/evaluator integrity remains valid, but the call is not an admissible protocol-valid primary screening and cannot support a positive claim.
screening_audit_scope_note: notes/screening_audit.json uses integrity_passed for candidate hash, deterministic rescore, evaluator count, and score coverage only; it does not audit pre-dev sequencing.
terminal_action: No more dev calls, no full gate, no multi-seed run, no test access, and no rescue module.
